description: A Honey rewards modal appears over the Flight Centre homepage
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel
frame_description: The Honey browser extension modal is visible on the right side of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'X' button to close the Honey rewards modal
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the close button of the modal just before it disappears.

page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Search flights' button immediately before the page begins to transition.

description: The page navigates from the homepage to the flight search results page
frame_description: The screen goes blank and the URL in the address bar updates to the search results path.

description: A loading screen appears with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and rotating airline logos
frame_description: The flight search results loading screen is visible, showing progress as it fetches deals.
